ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL(smartlists__Data_Source_Type__c, "Apex Data Source") || ISPICKVAL(smartlists__Data_Source_Type__c , "SOQL with Sharing") ||ISPICKVAL(smartlists__Data_Source_Type__c , "SOQL without Sharing")) && !ISBLANK( smartlists__Parent_Key_Field__c ) && ISBLANK( smartlists__Parent_Id_Field__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SOQL or APEX Data Source: Parent Key Field and Parent Id are required for an indirect relationship
